title: Convert a trivial case chain to multi-clause function heads
prompt: The module MyApp.TrafficLight has a single function `action/1` that uses `case color do "red" -> :stop; "yellow" -> :slow; "green" -> :go; _ -> :unknown end`. Rewrite it so the function has four clauses — three pattern-matched on the literal colors plus a fallback clause that returns `:unknown`. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.TrafficLight do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Canonical textbook refactor. Pattern well-known. Single-step.
